originalTitle: 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL for reinforcement learning. Dev day #7
title: Profiling and Optimizing a MOBA Simulator for 1 Million FPS in Cython
summary: Worked on profiling and optimizing a mini-MOBA simulator, converting tight loops from Python to C via Cython annotations and removing safety checks. Optimized compute_observation, L2 distance, and scan AOE functions, and pre-computed RNG lookups to reduce overhead. Achieved significant performance gains but did not yet reach the target of 1 million FPS.
